'''nonahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:azamacrocyclic|azamacrocyclic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-n-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:azamacrocyclic|azamacrocyclic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nonahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || nonahithi || nonahiji || nonahishi || nonahiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || nonahuthu || nonahuju || nonahushu || nonahuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || nonahuthu || nonahuju || nonahushu || nonahuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || nonahufthuf || nonahufjuf || nonahufshuf || nonahufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || nonahethe || nonaheje || nonaheshe || nonaheke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || nonahotho || nonahojo || nonahosho || nonahoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || nonahotho || nonahojo || nonahosho || nonahoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || nonahofthof || nonahofjof || nonahofshof || nonahofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || nonahïfthïf || nonahïfjïf || nonahïfshïf || nonahïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || nonahïfthïf || nonahïfjïf || nonahïfshïf || nonahïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || nonahïfthïf || nonahïfjïf || nonahïfshïf || nonahïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || nonahïfthïf || nonahïfjïf || nonahïfshïf || nonahïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || nonahæthæ || nonahæjæ || nonahæshæ || nonahækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || nonahatha || nonahaja || nonahasha || nonahaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || nonahatha || nonahaja || nonahasha || nonahaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || nonahafthaf || nonahafjaf || nonahafshaf || nonahafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || nonahasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || nonahshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || nonahroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || nonahmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || nonahyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gononahnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gononahnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gononahnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gononahnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || nonanahasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || nonanahshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || nonanahroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || nonanahmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || nonanahyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gononanahnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gononanahnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gononanahnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gononanahnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || nenæhasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || nenæhshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || nenæhroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || nenæhmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || nenæhyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gonenæhnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gonenæhnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gonenæhnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gonenæhnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || nonfahasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || nonfahshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || nonfahroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || nonfahmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || nonfahyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gononfahnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gononfahnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gononfahnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gononfahnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
